title: ononis mauritanica
intro: Ononis mauritanica, also known as the Spurred Spleenwort or Spleenwort, is a plant species within the family Fabaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include being a diuretic, astringent, and anti-inflammatory. It has various health benefits, such as treating kidney stones, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of rheumatism, as well as being used to treat digestive issues and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Ononis mauritanica typically involve drying and processing the plant's leaves and roots to create teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
